// // This comment suggests that t is set to 0 when p, q, and r are all 1, which is the opposite of the actual behavior.
module top_module (
	input p, 
	input q, 
	input r, 
	output reg t);assign t = (p & ~q & r) | (~p & q & r) | (p & q & ~r);
	
endmodule
